items.title: ICE agents keep accidentally shooting themselves
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Family of Palestinian-American man killed in West Bank demand accountability
items.dek: Nasrallah Abu Siyam was the sixth American citizen killed by Israeli settlers or soldiers in the West Bank in the last two years.
items.body: Nasrallah Abu Siyam was the sixth American citizen killed by Israeli settlers or soldiers in the West Bank in the last two years.

items.title: How will Trump's new 10% global tariffs work and what's next?
items.dek: The Supreme Court's decision has led questions over whether people can get a refund over the unlawful tariffs.
items.body: The Supreme Court's decision has led questions over whether people can get a refund over the unlawful tariffs.
